description_long: This object is a military-style, rotary grenade launcher with a robust, cylindrical drum magazine capable of holding multiple rounds. The main body is constructed from matte olive drab metal, featuring a prominent, ventilated handguard with a Picatinny rail on top for mounting accessories. The rear section includes a collapsible stock and a pistol grip, both designed for ergonomic handling and stability during firing. A vertical foregrip is attached beneath the barrel, providing additional control. The muzzle is fitted with a short, wide device, likely a flash hider or muzzle brake, and the overall design emphasizes durability and tactical use. The drum magazine is the most visually dominant feature, indicating the weapon's high-capacity, rapid-fire capability.
description: A military-style rotary grenade launcher with a large drum magazine, collapsible stock, and tactical grips in olive drab metal. Features a ventilated handguard, Picatinny rail, and a short muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, large drum magazine, collapsible stock, pistol grip, and vertical foregrip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide barrel, muzzle device, and the circular face of the drum magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the drum magazine and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock, pistol grip, and the rear face of the drum magazine.
